{{Infobox character
| name = Petal
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jyrine Tessella Marten|Jyrine]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|alchemy}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|journeyman alchemist}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Calder's crew, [[Blackwatch]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, [[The Testament]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, [[Champion’s Guild|Champion's Guild]], [[Champions]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|alchemist}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, crew member}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Testament]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, a building rented by the Champion's Guild}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Petal Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Petal is a reserved individual characterized by her frizzy black hair, which she often uses to hide her face and expressions. She frequently exhibits signs of anxiety, such as trembling, shivering, or shrinking into herself, and she generally avoids confrontation and finds it difficult to speak with strangers. Despite her timid nature, she has demonstrated a protective, sisterly instinct toward [[Jyrine]] and has expressed opinions regarding political matters, specifically concerning the [[Heart]] and the potential for an [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]]. Her skills or tasks include collecting glowing liquid from a [[Stormwing]] spine, handling bottled potions and acid, and utilizing a [[quicklamp]]. She is often seen near [[Urzaia]] or the crew on a ship's deck.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|As a self-trained alchemist, Petal serves as a member of [[Calder]]'s crew. During an early encounter, she sought cover behind a barrel and later provided a potion that induced a smile in [[Calder]]. While visiting the [[Blackwatch]] main base alongside [[Andel]] and [[Foster]], she used shaking hands to pour powder into a weapon. Throughout her travels, Petal carries a case of potions and bottled concoctions, often hiding her face in her hair or shivering while maintaining a safe distance from [[Naberius]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] is a member of the crew.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] is the ship's resident alchemist.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] is a self-trained alchemist.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] hid behind a barrel.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] provides a potion that causes [[Calder]] to smile.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] is a member of [[Calder]]'s crew.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] is a character who visited the main base of the [[Blackwatch]] with [[Andel]] and [[Foster]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] poured powder into a weapon with shaking hands.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] carries a case of potions.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] is a crewmember who shivers and hides her face in her hair.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] kept a safe distance from [[Naberius]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Petal]] is a member of the crew who carries a bottled potion.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A twenty-three-year-old crew member of [[The Testament]], Petal serves as an alchemist who is capable of brewing tea and providing first aid. While she was once rejected by the [[Guild]], she eventually found her home aboard a [[Navigator]]'s ship. As part of [[Calder]]'s crew, she is responsible for checking alchemical charges and manufacturing explosives, always ensuring she has a backup set of matches and a tiny [[quicklamp]]. During her time on board, she has been seen peeking from below deck and expressing her enjoyment of being part of the crew.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">16</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is a crew member who practices [[alchemy]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is mentioned by [[Andel]] in relation to the wine.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is a character on [[The Testament]] who provides first aid.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is trembling and clutching her bag.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] can brew tea.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is twenty-three years old.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] manufactures explosives.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is a member of [[Calder]]'s crew responsible for checking alchemical charges.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] has a backup set of matches.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is an alchemist on [[Calder]]'s crew who peeks from below deck.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is present and expresses that she likes being there.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is an alchemist and a crew member on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] is a crew member intended for potential first aid.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] possesses a tiny [[quicklamp]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] was rejected by the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Petal]] found her home on a [[Navigator]]'s ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A journeyman alchemist by [[Kanatalia]] standards, Petal lives aboard the ship [[The Testament]] and carries a pouch at her waist. As [[Jyrine]]'s sister and a crew member working alongside [[Foster]], she tends to [[Andel]] and presents an experimental draught to [[Calder]]. While staying in a building rented by the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]], she works with the [[Champions]] and attempts to share her research notes, fueled by a belief that [[Calder]] is still alive. After researching how to borrow the power of a [[Champion]], she provides [[Calder]] with medical supplies and eventually enhances his body. Following her development of a cocktail for [[Redshot]], Petal uses an alchemical sprayer and throws a glass bottle of thick pink liquid at [[Kelarac]] before joining a crowd around [[Foster]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">29</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is a journeyman alchemist by [[Kanatalia]] standards.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] lives on a ship called [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] carries a pouch at her waist.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is [[Jyrine]]'s sister.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] craves alchemical knowledge.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] teared up to match [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] has an acid solution.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is a crew member working with [[Foster]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is a crew member on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is tending to [[Andel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] presented an experimental draught to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is currently staying in a building rented by the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is a woman who was working with the [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] believes [[Calder]] is not dead.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] has been trying to get people to read her research notes since [[Calder]] arrived.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is a person who checks [[Calder]]'s eyes and reacts emotionally to his condition.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] researched borrowing the power of a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] provided [[Calder]] with a collection of medical supplies.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] whispered asking what was wrong with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is on the ramp of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] has enhanced [[Calder]]'s body.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] devised a cocktail for [[Redshot]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] sent a wax-paper packet to [[Jorin]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is a character who gave [[Andel]] an encouraging smile.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is shivering and appears ready to bolt.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] uses an alchemical sprayer.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] threw a glass bottle containing a thick pink liquid at [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] is a character who hugged [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Petal]] joined the crowd around [[Foster]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Petal whispered. “Checking the charges,”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Petal popped her head up. “I still like it here,” she said.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“That’s right. And we are, Petal. We are. So can you trust your sister, this once, when I tell you that what I’m doing isn’t going to hurt anyone?<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“What’s wrong with him?” Petal whispered.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Blackwatch]]
[[Category:Alchemists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
